verse_text: And the armies in heaven, clothed in fine linen, white and clean, followed Him on white horses.

links.context: The garments of the Church, and therefore of the saints, are her righteous deeds ([[REV.19:8]], [[REV.19:14]]), better than all spices, for they fill the world with the fragrance of Christ Himself ([[2CO.2:14]], [[2CO.2:15]]).
